basic_details.job_title: IIMLucknow Academic Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: IIM Lucknow is hiring for 1 Academic Assistant position in the Communication Area on a contractual basis.

important_dates.interview_date: To be intimated to shortlisted candidates

qualification.details: Duration: 11 months (full-time contractual, extendable based on performance and requirement) Salary: Rs. 40,000/- per month + HRA as per IIM Lucknow norms
qualification.education_qualification: Master’s degree in Communication, English, Media Studies, Psychology, or related fields from a recognized/reputed Institute/University in regular mode with minimum 60% marks.
qualification.experience: Prior teaching experience or research background will be an advantage.

how_to_apply: Interested and eligible candidates may send their CV, earliest date of joining, and phone number to [email protected] with the subject line: “Application for Academic Assistant - Communication Area” on or before 7th July 2026.
Only shortlisted candidates will be called for an interview.
Documents Required (to be sent along with application):
important_instructions: This is a contractual position and not a regular/permanent appointment. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the interview. Applications received after the last date or without proper subject line may not be considered. Candidates must possess the required educational qualifications as on the date of application. Preference will be given to candidates with relevant skills and experience.

content_sections.heading: IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow has announced the appointment of Academic Assistant - Communication Area. The position is ideal for candidates with strong communication, academic writing, and teaching aptitude. Interested candidates must send their applications by the deadline mentioned below. Download IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: IIM Lucknow is hiring for 1 Academic Assistant position in the Communication Area on a contractual basis.

rows.indian_institute_of_management_lucknow_i: Rs. 40,000/- per month + HRA as per norms

content_sections.heading: IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
content_sections.text: The Academic Assistant will support faculty members in the Communications Area with various academic and administrative responsibilities, including: Supporting course preparation, delivery, and evaluation Handling academic logistics such as grading and coordination Compiling monthly attendance and assisting students with learning support Managing digital content, case material, and classroom tools Evaluating Quizzes

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Application

rows.date: To be intimated to shortlisted candidates

content_sections.heading: IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Duration: 11 months (full-time contractual, extendable based on performance and requirement) Salary: Rs. 40,000/- per month + HRA as per IIM Lucknow norms

rows.details: Master’s degree in Communication, English, Media Studies, Psychology, or related fields from a recognized/reputed Institute/University in regular mode with minimum 60% marks.
Strong academic writing, public speaking, and digital content management skills.
Prior teaching experience or research background will be an advantage.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Interested and eligible candidates may send their CV, earliest date of joining, and phone number to [email protected] with the subject line: “Application for Academic Assistant - Communication Area” on or before 7th July 2026. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for an interview. Documents Required (to be sent along with application): Updated CV/Resume Details of earliest joining date Contact phone number

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant Applicants
content_sections.text: This is a contractual position and not a regular/permanent appointment. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the interview. Applications received after the last date or without proper subject line may not be considered. Candidates must possess the required educational qualifications as on the date of application. Preference will be given to candidates with relevant skills and experience.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to send the application is 7th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for Academic Assistant at IIM Lucknow?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive Rs. 40,000 per month + HRA as per institute norms.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility for IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant Communication Area?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Master’s degree in Communication, English, Media Studies, Psychology or related fields with minimum 60% marks.

faq.question: Q4. Is the IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant position permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is a full-time contractual position for 11 months, extendable based on performance.

faq.question: Q5. How to apply for IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Send your CV, earliest joining date, and phone number to [email protected] with the subject line “Application for Academic Assistant - Communication Area”.

faq.question: Q6. What is the duration of the Academic Assistant contract at IIM Lucknow?
faq.answer: The initial duration is 11 months, which may be extended based on performance and requirement.

faq.question: Q7. What skills are preferred for IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant?
faq.answer: Strong academic writing, public speaking, digital content management, and prior teaching/research experience are preferred.

faq.question: Q8. Will IIM Lucknow conduct an interview for Academic Assistant?
faq.answer: Yes, only shortlisted candidates will be called for an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Is experience mandatory for IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant 2026?
faq.answer: Experience is not mandatory but candidates with prior teaching or research background will have an advantage.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant Recruitment?
faq.answer: Refer to the official advertisement released by IIM Lucknow on their website or the shared PDF.
